reviews.review_title: Alr pls respond to this developers
reviews.review_description: Wonderful game I think people are overreacting about the “ gorilla tag models “ I mean yeah it is the model but like… why care? The game is wonderful and I’m not pressuring you to add multiplayer and I know it’s coming or it’s here but honestly good game and the cosmetics… wonderful except people are like “ tO eXPeNisE BRo “ but the cosmetics are just fine how they are. By the way don’t let the one star reviews get to you keep doing great on this wonderful game

The multiplayer doesn't work and this game gave my headset a virus I couldn't fix it for 2 days but when my headset died the virus finally went away the virus in question was just a black screen I couldn't open my menu at all restarting your headset doesn't work if you're how it happened I was doing the parkour and I fell in the lava then out the map don't download this game

BTW this haves gorrila tag motion and yeah The game is trash no multiplayer even though the game been release for more then 5 WHOLE MONTH or more like bro just release but it been here for so long and the night's are get really unfun now like whe only have 6 nights and all of theme are old BTW the cosmetic are so expensive like 4500 pebble just to get fur? like make them cheaper and the parkour is trash BTW weakly NEEDS to be lower to like and really hard and only 5 people beaten them and there's like no players at this point and like people are raging over impossible,and weakly like make them easier and also the people who beated impossible don,the get the 2500 more pebles also its really  not fun and bundles cost 10,00 dollars or more like stop being gready and there's like no moderation like people say bad words and spammed reported everyone in the lobby and they don,the get banned? and there's like only 2 things to do and joining kkk,mini99 arn,t  banable like the codes are very racist. And people are flexing and the special cosmetics are on discord Bro  discord moderates update there game over a month like updates are so long and that why this game is the worst BTW don,the judge my profile DO NOT RECOMMENDING playing also if you add IP for fnam I'll delete this review for cosmetics. Also plz fix the lag

This game and its developers really show off a lot creativity. From night 1 to night 5 it’s really is just so wonderful how it gives off the fnaf style. ￼And for those saying that the cosmetics are too expensive LOOK AT GTAGS PRICES and aleast you have a pretty good chance of getting moderator. “oH TheY usINg assets fROM gTAg” last time I checked this is supposed to be a gtag MIXED with fnaf plus does it even matter? Then people say the moderators are bad even tho some of them also gotta go out to school just like you. Y’all should really respect the moderators and Alex bro I mean Alex has to work on this big game like  90% of the time. I got mad respect for this guy because even though he gets a lot of hate he still fights though it and tries to make the games place where you can play gorilla tag in fnaf with out any issues

But I do have a question, can you add savable data(like in gtag where if you delete the game your progress is still there for when you reinstall it)

This game is sucks here are 3 reasons why I hate it number1 your force to play alone witch is too scary when you playing the nights  and models are unoriginal its literally the same as the gt lemming models 🤦‍♂️. And numder2 the punish ments in this game are to harsh like you break 1 small rule and the next thing you know your getting ban for a life time and numder3 you get a random jumpscare in every 5m and cosmetics are crap and expensive so that's why and fix your game.

reviews.review_title: The only fan game I play anymore.
reviews.review_description: I’m a retired gtag player that doesn’t do vr a lot, yet this is the only reason why I still get on vr. I play this game everyday, and I love the community and can’t get bored of it. With this creepy atmosphere that can make me have goosebumps, even in the lobby. One problem with this game is that the Quest 2 lags so much. I’m trying to get the third one, but it would take a while.
This game is really good and impossible is actually easy once you get the hang of it, also I loved the event and loved the cosmetics.
The game crashes everytim I get to night 3 I have quest 2 this shouldn't have to be an issue plz fix Gameboy alex
I only reached night 4 but honestly the greatest five nights at Freddy’s fan game I have fnaf but this is better since it has different characters with different things

Please add it we

So pls add it

reviews.review_title: Best gorilla tag fnaf fan game
reviews.review_description:
Don’t listen to the hate because the fun part about it is that it has all fun nights and they’re all different maps based off the game. The last night is so fun and hard. This has impressed me whoever made This is probably one of the best five nights at Freddy’s fan game. I ever played.  
Game Boy. Alex has impressed me and it has parkour, and the best part about it is that you’re by yourself in the nights. The last one is scary in hard. That’s why I love this game. And I had this game ever since I got my VR 
￼five star ⭐️￼⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️thx for the game

I love this game! I love Gorilla Tag and FNaF and this game is that mixed together! Though we can’t play with are friends yet I’m still having fun. This game is also easy because each night has only 2 monsters. I’m already on night 4. I hope this game gets a little bit more love because what we need in this game to make it better is multiplayer, other maps to open, and more cosmetics. Make sure to play this game!

reviews.review_title: This game made me love vr again
reviews.review_description: I used to play vr a lot, but I stopped because it was boring. A few weeks later I was searching fnaf on TikTok and I found five nights at monkey’s, so I was curious and watched one of the videos. I immediately got in my vr with my friend Ethan and started finding the secrets, finishing the parkour and reading the lore. Me and Ethan started having theories like what would happen if we left Fredrick on the first night? Today me and Ethan are going to bust these crazy theories. Or maybe tomorrow
This game is peak. Why because it’s cool. ￼
